channel.display-name: The Price Is Right: The Barker Era

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Pop Stars
programme.desc: The decade's most popular names and faces!

programme.title: Vevo '70s
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Sounds of the Seventies
programme.desc: From funk to punk, the Me Decade had a song for everyone.

programme.title: Pop Stars
programme.desc: The decade's most popular names and faces!

programme.title: Awesome Pop
programme.desc: Videos that made the '80s unforgettable.

programme.title: Vevo '80s
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: I Want My '80s Videos!
programme.desc: A mix of all your favorite artists from the decadent decade.

programme.title: Awesome Pop
programme.desc: Videos that made the '80s unforgettable.

programme.title: 90s Chill Morning
programme.desc: Slowly starting your morning with these videos.

programme.title: Vevo '90s
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: 90s Dance Hits
programme.desc: Turn up the BPMs with these '90s dance hits!

programme.title: All-Out '90s
programme.desc: Videos from grunge to gangsta.

programme.title: Morning Coffee
programme.desc: Chill videos to start your day with.

programme.title: Hot 2K Videos
programme.desc: The decade's best Pop, Hip-Hop, Alt and more!

programme.title: Hard Rock Heroes
programme.desc: The most loud and proud bands in music.

programme.title: Pure Punk!
programme.desc: Angst, aggression and all-out anarchy!

programme.title: EXTREME METAL
programme.desc: Videos not for the casual headbanger.

programme.title: Rise & Rock
programme.desc: Rock and Metal music videos from the iconic classics to today's future legends.

programme.title: Rise & Rock
programme.desc: Rock and Metal music videos from the iconic classics to today's future legends.

programme.title: Qello Concerts
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Queens of the Stone Age -- Zénith Paris 2013
programme.desc: The riff-oriented heavy rock with dark and moody performance by Queens of the Stone Age; best enjoyed with the volume turned up high.

programme.title: Bastille - Reading and Leeds Festival 2022
programme.desc: The Reading and Leeds Festivals are a pair of annual music festivals that take place in Reading and Leeds, England; featuring Bastille.

programme.title: Stingray Djazz
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Stingray Djazz
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Live Music
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Nick Cannon introduces the world to his new R&B boy band, Pop Money. We'll witness the highs and lows of the band's first tour as well as their initial success as they release their debut EP.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Nick Cannon sits down with VIBE editor-in-chief Datwon Thomas to make their predictions for the season 1 artists and where their careers will take them.

programme.title: Hendrix (2000)
programme.desc: On stage, Jimi Hendrix (Wood Harris) electrified audiences with his powerful guitar playing and mesmerizing performances. But behind the scenes -- fueled by a dark haze of drugs and alcohol -- this rising star was on a crash course with destiny.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Layers and layers of mountains, as far as the eye can see -- Bob Ross shows us the secret to creating a larger-than-life landscape.

programme.title: The Bob Ross Channel
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The stillness of a winter's day, with a happy sun shining bright in the sky, can be beautifully captured on canvas, and Bob Ross shows you how.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the salt spray as Bob Ross paints ocean waves under abundant clouds, rolling in to spend their energy against sand and rock.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Two old-fashioned dishes with modern appeal: Boston baked beans and chicken and dumplings.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Cider-Braised Turkey, Grilled Sweet Potatoes with Maple Chile Crisp; visit to Minneapolis

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia makes Southern-Style Smothered Chicken and Bridget makes Apple Pandowdy.

programme.title: The Jamie Oliver Channel
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie shows pushbike couriers how to make great lunches; squashed cherry tomato salad; meatballs; calzones.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie prepares chick pea and leek soup, braised lamb shanks and English trifle for the men renovating his flat.

programme.title: Indian Street Food With Jamie
programme.desc: A bite-sized clip selection of Jamie's most-loved recipes and kitchen moments.

programme.title: No Reservations
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony takes on his hometown of New York City.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Via Vespa, trolley tracks and by foot, Tony dives into Roman culture.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Behind the wheel of his corvette Tony sees the best and seediest of Miami.

programme.title: BUZZR
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Tattletales
programme.desc: Celebrity couples answer questions to win money for the audience.

programme.title: Divided
programme.desc: A personal trainer and a bartender compete debate against a racing clock.

programme.title: Divided
programme.desc: Four strangers including a fashion buyer and a tour guide debate.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Brian may refuse to ride in the front seat of a car, may date only women with larger than a D-cup, or may believe he can get any woman to have sex with him.

programme.title: Pictionary
programme.desc: Hollywood celebrities and their teammates compete to guess words and phrases based on eachother's drawings. Hosted by Jerry O'Connell.

programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: The Price Is Right: The Barker Era
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.desc: Participants must guess the prices of different types of items, ranging from vehicles to electronic appliances, to win a prize.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.desc: Participants must guess the prices of different types of items, ranging from vehicles to electronic appliances, to win a prize.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.desc: Participants must guess the prices of different types of items, ranging from vehicles to electronic appliances, to win a prize.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.desc: Participants must guess the prices of different types of items, ranging from vehicles to electronic appliances, to win a prize.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Hedy Lamarr designs the first modern airplane wing, Eartha Kitt's activism provokes the ire of Lady Bird Johnson, and Alexis Pulaski's poodle becomes a huge star.

programme.title: Comedy Central Pluto TV
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Wayne Wheeler becomes the face of Prohibition, Dorothy Fuldheim breaks barriers in news broadcasting, and Muhammad Ali refuses to fight in the Vietnam War. Featuring Gaius Charles, Samm Levine, Mary Elizabeth Ellis, George Wallace and Ron Funches.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Lawndale High holds a medieval fair to raise money for a new library roof, and Quinn tries out for the lead in a play.

programme.title: MST3K
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Mitchell
programme.desc: The trio sit through a dreary Joe Don Baker disasterpiece as Gypsy tries to find a way to save Joel from being killed by the Mads.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Zigra
programme.desc: The seventh offering from Gamera: the infamous turtle faces off against an alien called Zigra determined on world domination. Joel and the Bots build a scale model of Gamera and make shoebox dioramas.

programme.title: Classic TV Drama
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Cooper and the One-Armed Man inspect guests at the Great Northern. Hawk finds Harold Smith dead by his own hand…with a mysterious suicide note and the diary torn to shreds. Leo speaks to Bobby about "new shoes."

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the mysterious death of Allegra, Hunter's former girlfriend.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: When Hunter (FRED DRYER) investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner, Frank Garriman (JAMES McEACHIN), becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.

programme.title: 70s Cinema
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Man Who Fell To Earth
programme.desc: Thomas Jerome Newton (David Bowie) is a humanoid alien who comes to Earth to get water for his dying planet. He starts a high technology company to get the billions of dollars he needs to build a return spacecraft.

programme.title: 80s Rewind
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: 80s Rewind
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: 90s Throwback
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: 90s Throwback
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: 00s Replay
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story about a single father and his young son. Finding themselves homeless, he risks everything on an unpaid internship in a highly competitive stockbroker training program, where only one in twenty interns make the grade.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: 00s Replay
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story about a single father and his young son. Finding themselves homeless, he risks everything on an unpaid internship in a highly competitive stockbroker training program, where only one in twenty interns make the grade.

programme.title: Classic Movies Channel
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Artists and Models
programme.desc: A goonish young man receives telepathic top secret information in his nightmares, which are used by his artist friend in comic strips. Foreign agents and the CIA get interested.

programme.title: The Stooge
programme.desc: Money isn't everything and Bill Miller proves it. He's carved out a modest niche as a singer in the off-vaudeville circuit. But suddenly his act is big news.

programme.title: Paramount Movie Channel
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Evolution
programme.desc: A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.

programme.title: Paramount Movie Channel
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Evolution
programme.desc: A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.

programme.title: Paramount Movie Channel
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: Will Ferrell & Mark Wahlberg face off in this Dad vs Step-Dad showdown! Brad (Ferrell) wants to be the best step-dad to his new wife's kids. But when their actual father Dusty (Wahlberg) shows up, the two must go toe-to-toe in this fun family comedy.

programme.title: MovieSphere by Lionsgate
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Joey, an alcoholic war veteran assumes a new identity after returning from a traumatic tour in Afghanistan and becomes a vigilante in a bid to atone for his sins.

programme.title: Mud
programme.desc: On a Mississippi River island, two young friends (Tye Sheridan, Jacob Lofland) encounter a fugitive (Matthew McConaughey) whose wild tales about a beautiful woman and a line of bounty hunters come true.

programme.title: MovieSphere by Lionsgate
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Joey, an alcoholic war veteran assumes a new identity after returning from a traumatic tour in Afghanistan and becomes a vigilante in a bid to atone for his sins.

programme.title: Pluto TV Staff Picks
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: South Park: Bigger, Longer & Uncut
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman sneak into an R-rated movie that warps their fragile minds. Soon their parents declare war on Canada and the guys are America's last hope to stop Armageddon.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: Team America, an international police force dedicated to maintaining global stability learns that a power hungry dictator is brokering weapons of mass destruction to terrorists.

programme.title: Pluto TV Staff Picks
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: South Park: Bigger, Longer & Uncut
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman sneak into an R-rated movie that warps their fragile minds. Soon their parents declare war on Canada and the guys are America's last hope to stop Armageddon.

programme.title: Pluto TV Icons
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: Will Ferrell & Mark Wahlberg face off in this Dad vs Step-Dad showdown! Brad (Ferrell) wants to be the best step-dad to his new wife's kids. But when their actual father Dusty (Wahlberg) shows up, the two must go toe-to-toe in this fun family comedy.

programme.desc: The acclaimed hit thriller that asks "who's conning who," with its irresistibly entertaining tale of a small-time "grifter" caught in a web of passion and mistrust.

programme.desc: Michael Cera stars in a hilarious comedy about an obnoxious American and a girl named Crystal Fairy (Gaby Hoffman) who take a hallucinogen on a trip through Chile.

programme.title: Drugstore June
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her small town is robbed, a girl who still lives at home with her parents takes matters into her own hands to solve the crime, while at the same time trying to get over her ex-boyfriend and become more of an adult.

programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.desc: A wealthy businessman searching for his missing brother is drawn into a dark underworld that threatens his sanity and his family.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk loses his memory and is proclaimed a God while trapped on a planet whose inhabitants are descended from Northwestern Native Americans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise reaches a Federation colony where the adults have all killed themselves but the children play without care.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Worf learns some painful lessons about parenting when his son Alexander arrives to join his father on the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A young boy who is the sole survivor of a devastated ship becomes obsessed with simulating Data.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Jadzia Dax must choose between her feelings and the rules of Trill society when she is reunited with the wife of one of Dax's previous hosts.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A fierce battle with the Jem'Hadar leaves the Defiant trapped in a planet's volatile atmosphere.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A space anomaly generates a duplicate Voyager and crew, but only one ship can survive an assault by Vidiian invaders.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A Vulcan mating ritual pits Torres against a fellow crewmember, while Chakotay makes a shocking discovery about invaders of a strange planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay finds a planet of unassimilated Borg drones from all over the galaxy.

programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: America in Color
programme.desc: A look at the journey of the American worker through the first half of the 20th century.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: Can a generation gap actually cause a catastrophic air disaster? Witness the story of BEA Flight 548.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: Join NTSB and military experts as they work together to uncover how a fighter jet could collide with a civilian flight.

programme.title: Modern Marvels by HISTORY
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Soft drinks, donuts, meat snacks, popcorn, and gum represent humanity's need to feed cravings; from handmade treats of earliest civilizations to hi-tech mass production, these snack foods evolved through history into modern manufacturing.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A fascinating journey from farm to table; the dizzying heights of California's date palm trees; the soggy Wisconsin cranberry marshes; the cavernous labyrinths of Pennsylvania's mushroom farms; picking through the unique forms of harvesting.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Digging up salt mining's history, from the "white gold" on the table to the oceanic and underground deposits whence it came; today people take salt for granted, but most life depends on it.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Around the world and across the eons, gold stands as a symbol of power, wealth, and love; the story of the hunters of the precious metal and their methods for extracting it.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The construction of the 51-mile canal that took ten years to build and employed over 40,000 workers, 6,000 of whom died of yellow fever, malaria, and other horrors; an earlier, nine-year attempt by the French ended in failure and cost 20,000 lives.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Since 200 BC, when the Greek Philosopher Archimedes created a device for lifting water, the pump has been synonymous with transporting Earth's most precious resource.

programme.title: Modern Marvels by HISTORY
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: In this episode, we travel to Greece and Italy to make the fabled 'descent into hell'.

programme.title: Pluto TV History
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: With Capone in jail, Frank Nitti, Paul Ricca, and Joe Accardo take over. A Hollywood scandal presents Sam Giancana with a chance to prove himself.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In this special edition episode, explore the mysterious features of three of Europe's most extraordinary places: Galicia, Spain, Campania, Italy, and Delphi, Greece.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Pluto TV Science
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe, the further back in time we reach. Most of what we see is actually dark matter and dark energy, but its nature eludes us ... for the moment.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Perspective
programme.desc: For most of human history, the night sky seemed two-dimensional. To our ancestors, this perspective gave no hint to the universe's true depth.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles
programme.desc: In 1967, in response to a growing threat by her Arab neighbors, Israel launches a pre-emptive strike against Egypt in the Sinai. This is the story of one of the swiftest and most dramatic victories in modern warfare.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles
programme.desc: By 1942, the Japanese Empire stretched halfway across the Pacific Ocean. This is the rarely told story of the key role played by US Marine tanks in the Pacific Campaign. They fight bloody battles against fanatical Japanese forces.

programme.title: Pluto TV Military
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII
programme.desc: Invasion of Sicily. Mussolini's downfall. Ploesti. Invasion of the Italian Peninsula.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team travel to Wells in Somerset to see Fabergé jewellery, a plate by Pugin, and a guitar left behind in England by a soldier.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include an 18th century statue and an Indian Order of Merit medal awarded to a Sikh soldier in World War I.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items include a DeLorean car, a stone head dug up in a garden and a carving with links to maritime history.

programme.title: PBS Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1946 Einstein-signed photo and prints; Agassiz pendant watch circa 1905; Chinese gold-splashed bronze vase circa 1850.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Revisiting fan favorites from 2002, including a Tang dynasty marble lion.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: How appraisals from 15 years ago have changed in the market, including Andrew Clemens sand art circa 1880; a 1933 All-Star Game signed baseball; an 1886 Jasper Cropsey painting.

programme.title: The Reptiles

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Going Medieval
programme.desc: The Cajun Pawn Stars battle it out for a rare medieval Saxon helmet. Meanwhile, shop regular Chester looks to trigger a deal for his crossbow.

programme.desc: Jimmie's team seeks to dip into the buzzing business of beekeeping. Will they fly away with a sweet deal or get stung in the process?

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan may be in over his head when he seeks to sell his boss' apartment along with his 400-piece art collection; Fredrik scores the biggest single-unit listing of his career; Luis referees a high-stakes negotiation between a buyer and seller.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: While trying to sell a $35 million listing in the Time Warner Center, Fredrik hits a wall when he targets Chinese buyers; Ryan is the proud recipient of a very special delivery; old friends come knocking with a new listing in Harlem.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Crossing Over
programme.desc: TAPS calls in the GHI team to investigate the Spalding Inn, a historic property in Whitefield, New Hampshire owned by Jason and Grant.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Garden State Asylum
programme.desc: The TAPS team travels to New Jersey to investigate the infamous Essex County Hospital.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a man in possession of stolen property brandishing a rifle. Officers respond to a call of brothers in a fist fight. Police intervene when a couple argues in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.
